meta.method: Scope-change events reconstructed from CSV-history birth commits (docs/audit/phantom-completed-2026-07-21.md birth-by-commit analysis) + live git. Only in-repo evidence; no estimation.

scope_events.detail: Bulk task-registration commit created Sprint-18 task rows incl. DOC-015/016, IFC-211-287, PG-160. Tasks entered the plan via a project-tracker sync commit, not individual planning.

13 Sprint-18 module-settings rows (PG-196,197,198,199,201,202,203,204,205,206,207,208,209) were born directly into the plan as Backlog via a bulk metrics/tracker sync — ~8 weeks after the first Sprint-18 completions (2026-02-23). Mid-sprint scope addition.

note: At least 13 of 67 committed tasks (19.4%) were injected mid-window rather than committed at sprint planning. Combined with a null sprint start/end date, this means Sprint 18 had no fixed commitment baseline — scope was continuous. This is the structural driver behind the "sprint" spanning ~149 days.
